title: Training and Development Specialists
description: Design or conduct work-related training and development programs to improve individual skills or organizational performance. May analyze organizational training needs or evaluate training effectiveness.

tasks.text: Present information with a variety of instructional techniques or formats, such as role playing, simulations, team exercises, group discussions, videos, or lectures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Obtain, organize, or develop training procedure manuals, guides, or course materials, such as handouts or visual materials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate modes of training delivery, such as in-person or virtual, to optimize training effectiveness, training costs, or environmental impacts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Offer specific training programs to help workers maintain or improve job skills.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assess training needs through surveys, interviews with employees, focus groups, or consultation with managers, instructors, or customer representatives.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor, evaluate, or record training activities or program effectiveness.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Design, plan, organize, or direct orientation and training programs for employees or customers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop alternative training methods if expected improvements are not seen.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate training materials prepared by instructors, such as outlines, text, or handouts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Monitor training costs and prepare budget reports to justify expenditures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Devise programs to develop executive potential among employees in lower-level positions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Keep up with developments in area of expertise by reading current journals, books, or magazine articles.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend meetings or seminars to obtain information for use in training programs or to inform management of training program status.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate recruitment and placement of training program participants.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select and assign instructors to conduct training.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Negotiate contracts with clients for desired training outcomes, fees, or expenses.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise, evaluate, or refer instructors to skill development classes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Schedule classes based on availability of classrooms, equipment, or instructors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Refer trainees to employer relations representatives, to locations offering job placement assistance, or to appropriate social services agencies, if warranted.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or implement training programs related to efficiency, recycling, or other issues with environmental impacts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
